ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the student's parent */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the student's parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the batch */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the batch */,
  "batch_type" TEXT /* Type of batch (e.g., regular, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_standards" (
  "batch_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch-standard mapping */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard */,
  "batch_standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch-standard mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_standards_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_standards_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "fee_name" TEXT /* Name of the fee */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., tuition, library) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_fees" (
  "student_fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-fee mapping */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee */,
  "batch_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch-standard mapping */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid by the student */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_fees_batch_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_standard_id") REFERENCES batch_standards ("batch_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_fees_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_fees_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., online, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who needs to make the payment */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee that needs to be paid */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date by which the payment needs to be made */,
  "reminder_status" TEXT /* Status of reminder (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_reminders_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_reminders_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who needs to pay the fee */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fee that needs to be paid */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the payment needs to be made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "invoice_status" TEXT /* Status of invoice (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, teacher, student) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., staff, non-staff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "academic_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
